Function.Inference: Swing intro with piano chords and trills, concluding with a fermata.
Tempo and meter changes, rubato transition bridging into the main section.
Main Sprixie Kingdom theme introduced in C minor.
The main theme transposes up to D minor.
Final section in Eb minor, building up to a concluding hit.
